title: Cinnamon Crunch Canadian Sweet Potato Pancake
description: A low-carb friendly, salty and crispy breakfast dish featuring sweet potatoes cooked in a cinnamon-infused batter.

ingredients.name: eggs
ingredients.notes: beaten with a pinch of salt and black pepper

ingredients.name: cinnamon
ingredients.notes: mixed with a pinch of sea salt for flavoring

instructions: In a mixing bowl, combine the sweet potato, eggs, flaxseed meal or chia seeds, vanilla extract, salt, and cinnamon. Stir well until all ingredients are evenly distributed.
Slowly add water or almond milk while stirring continuously to achieve the desired batter consistency (should be similar to pancake batter).

Heat a non-stick pan over medium heat. Add 1 tablespoon of coconut oil for every 2 pancakes you plan to make. Ensure the pan is sufficiently heated by dropping in a small amount of water; it should sizzle if ready.
Using about ¼ cup of batter per pancake, spoon or pour onto the hot pan. Cook until bubbles form on top and sides start to turn golden brown (about 2-3 minutes).
Once done, flip with a spatula and cook for another minute or two on the other side. Remove from heat immediately.
Serve warm with your favorite toppings such as fresh fruit, maple syrup, whipped cream or a drizzle of honey. Enjoy as an indulgent yet healthy brunch option!
